title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — MassAbility DDS Companion PRR for Operational Metrics, Workload, Overtime, and Special Populations
description: Ready-to-file Massachusetts Public Records Law (M.G.L. c. 66, § 10) companion request to MassAbility (formerly MRC) for the DDS division's operational metrics, two specific reconciliations, workload/caseload assignment records, overtime records, and additional special-population breakouts. Contains the asks formerly listed as Sections 2, 3, 6, 7, and 9 of the consolidated MassAbility DDS PRR, split into a second request so the primary MassAbility PRR remains shorter and easier to process.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts (DDS division of MassAbility / former MRC; Boston and Worcester offices)

source.publisher: MassAbility (formerly Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission) — Records Access Officer (request target)
source.title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — M.G.L. c. 66, § 10

update_cadence: As needed (revise FY ranges, requester name, and metric list before each filing).
notes: Confidence tier = Authoritative because this file IS a canonical, repo-maintained state public-records request template, not a derived data observation. Split from prr-templates/massability-dds-prr on 2026-06-06 at user direction because the consolidated request had too many questions for a single PRR. Requester contact fields are filled for Wardis Vizcaino using a personal, non-@ssa.gov email address.
